title: Lower Bicutan Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Lower Bicutan with a Z-Score of +3.46. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave has caused extremely high temperatures in Lower Bicutan, with a CDD of 11.1 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 76%, making the conditions even more unbearable. 
 The wind speed is at a low 0.8 km/h, providing little to no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
